summary: Recording offers high‑resolution specs but the barn acoustics limit any audible benefit, leaving the show’s quality unclear
review: The sole reviewer doubts that the 96 kHz/24‑bit format adds any real clarity to this performance recorded in an old barn, suggesting the venue's sound overwhelms the technical advantages. No musical details are provided, so the show itself cannot be evaluated from these comments.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review, negative about the recording and no information on performance; rating reflects poor perceived audio value and lack of show data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: High‑resolution 96/24 format does not improve sound due to barn acoustics; likely muffled or lacking clarity.
